results.title: Beyond the Protests-III: What the Crisis Means for Kashmir's Political Future
results.description: The unfolding crisis in Pakistan-administered Jammu and Kashmir has evolved from immediate grievances into a broad citizens’ movement exposing deep mistrust between the public and state institutions. With protests led by local committees rather than traditional parties, the government faces a complex negotiation landscape. Divided political responses, questions over election legitimacy, economic disruption and calls for a Truth and Reconciliation Commission underscore a pivotal test of governance, accountability and democratic stability in the region.

results.title: Mary Habila’s Death: AENWC Urges Nigerians Not To Judge Too Soon
results.description: The Advocacy for the Empowerment of Nigerian Women and Children (AENWC) has called on Nigerians to remain calm, peaceful and law-abiding as investigations continue into the tragic death of Miss Mary Habila, warning against prejudging the outcome of the probe or demanding sanctions against individuals before the facts are established. results.title: Mnangagwa Calls for Collective Effort in Building Zimbabwe
results.description: President Emmerson Mnangagwa has called on Zimbabweans to take an active role in the country’s development, urging citizens to contribute to nation-building from the grassroots level. results.title: DMK backs women’s reservation on current Lok Sabha strength: MP Tiruchi Siva
results.description: The DMK on Sunday urged the government to come out with a clear formula on the Constitution amendment bill for providing 33 per cent reservation to women in Lok Sabha and state assemblies, asserting that the quota should be given on the current strength of the Lower House.
